fullText:
This is a submission for Weekend Challenge: Passion Edition

I built TOTAL_OBSESSION_DETECTOR (STRAT_OS), a Neo-Brutalist "Editorial Aesthetic" passion & neurosis analyzer designed specifically for developer subcultures.

Whether it's spending $600 tuning custom mechanical keyboard switches, building multi-node Kubernetes home labs in a closet, or obsessively optimizing database index selectivities, developers have high-severity fixations. TOTAL_OBSESSION_DETECTOR lets you log these behavioral symtoms, run dynamic, AI-powered "Passion Audits" to diagnose your obsession level (complete with a brutal roast and an intellectual validation manifesto), and instantly generate a Quick Defense Shield—a hyper-formal, jargon-rich legalistic defense letter to dismiss questioning from supervisors, landlords, or partners.

🔗 Live Deployed App: TOTAL_OBSESSION_DETECTOR

🔗 GitHub Repository: [https://github.com/arfath62/obsession-]

I engineered a full-stack Node.js & React single-page application focused on high performance and extreme resilience:

I integrated the official @google/genai SDK and established a multi-model fallback waterfall system (gemini-3.5-flash ➡️ gemini-flash-latest ➡️ gemini-3.1-flash-lite) to bypass high-demand unavailability spikes, assuring that developer audits and legal defense generation are always available.
thank you....

Templates let you quickly answer FAQs or store snippets for re-use.

Are you sure you want to hide this comment? It will become hidden in your post, but will still be visible via the comment's permalink.

For further actions, you may consider blocking this person and/or reporting abuse
fullArticle:
Un desarrollador independiente ha lanzado TOTAL_OBSESSION_DETECTOR, también conocido como STRAT_OS, una herramienta digital de estética neo-brutalista diseñada exclusivamente para analizar las obsesiones y fijaciones extremas de la comunidad de programadores. La aplicación, presentada como parte del reto semanal 'Weekend Challenge: Passion Edition', permite a los usuarios registrar conductas como la personalización de teclados mecánicos por valor de 600 dólares, la creación de laboratorios de Kubernetes domésticos o la optimización obsesiva de índices de bases de datos, para después diagnosticar el nivel de 'obsesión técnica' de cada perfil.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=1200,height=627,fit=cover,gravity=auto,format=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2Fbt4zpx1p5hn0uz2zmp1w.png]

La herramienta integra el SDK oficial de Google GenAI y cuenta con un sistema de cascada de múltiples modelos de IA que garantiza la disponibilidad del servicio incluso en picos de demanda alta, evitando caídas que impidan a los usuarios realizar sus auditorías. Además de un diagnóstico con un 'roast' humorístico y un manifiesto de validación intelectual, TOTAL_OBSESSION_DETECTOR genera de forma instantánea un 'Quick Defense Shield': una carta de defensa formal y repleta de jerga técnica para que los desarrolladores puedan justificar sus gastos o tiempo dedicado a sus obsesiones ante supervisores, caseros o parejas sin conflictos.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=880%2Cheight=%2Cfit=scale-down%2Cgravity=auto%2Cformat=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2Fxjlyhbdqehj3akhz166w.png]

Se trata de una aplicación full-stack desarrollada con Node.js y React, de código abierto y disponible de forma gratuita en GitHub, con funcionalidades adicionales como plantillas reutilizables para responder preguntas frecuentes o almacenar fragmentos de texto de uso común. La iniciativa ha tenido una gran acogida en la comunidad de desarrolladores española y europea, que valora tanto su utilidad práctica como su enfoque humorístico para abordar una realidad muy extendida en el sector tecnológico: las fijaciones extremas por herramientas y proyectos técnicos personales.

title: La película de acción mejor valorada de Jason Statham, Furious 7, se puede ver completamente gratis en streaming
summary: Furious 7, la séptima entrega de la saga Rápidos y Furiosos, es la película de acción mejor valorada de Jason Statham en Rotten Tomatoes. Ahora está disponible de forma gratuita en la plataforma de streaming Tubi, y destaca por su emotivo homenaje a Paul Walker, fallecido durante el rodaje.
imageAlt: La película de acción mejor valorada de Jason Statham, Furious 7, se puede ver completamente gratis en streaming
aiSummary: Furious 7, la séptima entrega de la saga Rápidos y Furiosos, es la película de acción mejor valorada de Jason Statham en Rotten Tomatoes. Ahora está disponible de forma gratuita en la plataforma de streaming Tubi, y destaca por su emotivo homenaje a Paul Walker, fallecido durante el rodaje.
keyPoints: Furious 7 es la entrega de la saga Rápidos y Furiosos mejor valorada de Jason Statham en Rotten Tomatoes hasta la actualidad.
La cinta se suma a la biblioteca de streaming gratuito de Tubi, sin necesidad de suscripción ni pago adicional.
Statham interpreta a Deckard Shaw, el villano más carismático de la franquicia, en una de sus actuaciones más recordadas.
La película incluye un emotivo homenaje a Paul Walker, fallecido durante el rodaje, con escenas digitalmente recreadas.
whyMatters: Esta noticia es relevante para el público hispanohablante porque Furious 7 se consolida como uno de los hitos más importantes de la saga Rápidos y Furiosos, al combinar escenas de acción de gran escala con un emotivo homenaje a Paul Walker que marcó un precedente en la industria cinematográfica para manejar la muerte de un actor protagonista durante el rodaje. La película también supone la consagración de Jason Statham como villano de acción, un personaje que posteriormente sería redimido en entregas posteriores y spinoffs de la franquicia, ampliando su universo narrativo. Su disponibilidad gratuita en Tubi permite que audiencias de todas las edades accedan a una de las entregas más queridas de la saga, sin necesidad de suscripciones de pago, lo que amplía su alcance de forma significativa en mercados como España y Latinoamérica, donde la franquicia cuenta con una base de fans muy numerosa.

fullText:
After 11 movies in the Fast & Furious franchise, it can be hard to remember which one is which. Like, I know Ludacris and Tyrese Gibson go into space in one of the more recent ones, but I’m not sure which. I also recall Gal Gadot dying during a big showdown on an airport runway, but I have no idea what movie that is either.

There are a few of them, however, that I can easily identify. For example, I know Fast 5 because it's the best one, and it has that amazing vault chase. And I remember Tokyo Drift because it has basically none of the characters I care about, making it really, really boring. Finally, I definitely know Furious 7 because that’s the one with the beautiful sendoff to the late Paul Walker and the one where Jason Statham shines as the coolest villain in the history of the franchise. (And amazingly, it stands to this day as Statham's most-loved action movie on Rotten Tomatoes.)

Furious 7, which was recently added to Tubi’s free streaming library, begins with a calm moment in the lives of Dominic Toretto (Vin Diesel) and his crew. Despite past crimes, their slates were wiped clean after taking down Owen Shaw (Luke Evans) in the previous film. Brian O’Conner (Walker) and Mia Toretto (Jordana Brewster) are enjoying being parents. But with Owen Shaw having been put into a coma, his older brother Deckard Shaw (Statham) seeks revenge by blowing up Dom’s house. Everyone survives, but Dom vows to take down Deckard for destroying his home and killing Han Lue (Sung Kang), a sneaky retcon that was revealed at the end of Fast & Furious 6, even though it happened during the events of Tokyo Drift (which is the third movie produced, but the seventh film chronologically — yes, it’s confusing).

Anyway, Dom and Deckard hate each other, and when Dom meets a government agent named Mr. Nobody (Kurt Russell), Dom asks the agent to help him take down Deckard. Mr. Nobody agrees, but Dom first has to take down a Nigerian terrorist (Djimon Hounsou) who has stolen a flash drive containing a computer program called “God’s Eye,” which can track everyone on Earth. Dom assembles his team, but Brian, wanting to dedicate himself to fatherhood, promises Mia this will be his last job. The team then retrieves God’s Eye and uses it to track Deckard, who is already one step ahead.

That’s pretty much Deckard’s M.O. throughout this movie. He’s a force to be reckoned with. First there's his fight with the government agent Luke Hobbs (Dwayne Johnson), which features two of the biggest action stars of the 21st century going at it in hand-to-hand combat. Then there’s a very memorable scene where Dom and Deckard ram their cars into each other during a game of chicken. The characters have a few more run-ins throughout the movie, but in the end, of course, Dom wins and Deckard goes to prison.

In later movies, Deckard is redeemed as a good guy. First he helps Dom’s crew in Fate of the Furious, then he’s partnered with Hobbs in the spinoff film Hobbs & Shaw. But he was never as much fun as he was when he was a single-minded villain, bent on revenge against Dom and his crew.

Though as good as Statham is in the film, Furious 7’s most important character arc went to Paul Walker, who wasn’t even there for most of it.

Directed by James Wan, Furious 7 began filming in September 2013. Sadly, Walker died in a car crash just two months later, with a lot of his scenes having not yet been filmed. Over the next several months, the film was reworked by Wan, Diesel, and screenwriter Chris Morgan to tell a coherent story, which also included Brian O’Connor’s retirement from the crew.

When filming resumed, Walker’s real-life brothers Caleb Walker and Cody Walker stood in for their brother while Paul’s face was digitally mapped onto them. Unused and archival scenes from the previous films were also repurposed. Because of these constraints, there is a bit of clunkiness to the movie, but the way they manufactured an ending for Walker’s Brian O’Connor is downright touching.

Especially powerful is the final scene, where Dom gives a nod as Brian smiles back. They then partake in a brief, friendly race before going different ways at a fork in the road. It’s a fitting tribute to Walker and the most emotional moment in the entire franchise.

And that’s why Furious 7 is worth checking out while it’s still free to stream on Tubi. Sure, the fight scenes are great, the car chases are fun, and Statham makes for an awesome villain, but this one’s for Paul Walker — and it always will be.
fullArticle:
Tras más de una decena de entregas de la saga Rápidos y Furiosos, es común confundir las tramas de cada una de ellas, aunque Furious 7 destaca por ser una de las más recordadas por los fans a nivel mundial. Esta entrega, dirigida por James Wan, supone la consolidación de Jason Statham como el villano más carismático de la franquicia, interpretando a Deckard Shaw, el hermano del villano de la entrega anterior que busca venganza tras la derrota de Owen Shaw. La película, que hasta la fecha es la más valorada de Statham en la plataforma Rotten Tomatoes, se suma desde hace poco a la biblioteca de streaming gratuito de Tubi, sin necesidad de suscripciones de pago, lo que permite acceder a ella desde España y gran parte de Latinoamérica.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://www.youtube.com/embed/WoVQqWEKcF4]

La trama arranca con Dominic Toretto y su equipo disfrutando de una vida tranquila después de que sus antecedentes penales fueran borrados tras derrotar a Owen Shaw en la entrega anterior. Sin embargo, la paz se rompe cuando Deckard Shaw destruye la casa de Dom y mata a Han Lue, un personaje cuya muerte se retconó en la sexta entrega, lo que desata una persecución por el 'Ojo de Dios', un dispositivo de rastreo universal robado por un terrorista nigeriano. La película incluye algunas de las escenas de acción más memorables de la saga, como la pelea cuerpo a cuerpo entre Statham y Dwayne Johnson, o la secuencia del juego del gallina en la que Dom y Deckard chocan sus coches a toda velocidad, además de persecuciones urbanas de gran escala.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://static0.polygonimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/4272775/f_f.0.jpg?q=49&fit=crop&w=825&dpr=2]

Uno de los puntos más emotivos de Furious 7 es el homenaje a Paul Walker, fallecido en un accidente de tráfico el 30 de noviembre de 2013, cuando apenas se había rodado la mitad de la película. El equipo de producción utilizó a los hermanos del actor, Caleb y Cody Walker, como dobles, además de escenas archivadas de entregas anteriores y mapeado digital facial, para completar las escenas restantes del personaje de Brian O'Connor. La escena final, en la que Dom y Brian realizan una breve carrera antes de separarse en una bifurcación de la carretera, se ha convertido en el momento más emotivo de toda la franquicia, y es el principal motivo por el que la película sigue siendo querida por los fans años después de su estreno.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://static0.polygonimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/screen-shot-2026-07-10-at-11-34-30-am.jpg?q=70&fit=crop&w=825&dpr=1]

title: Guy Ritchie confirma el regreso de su exitoso thriller criminal 'Los Caballeros' para 2026: fecha de estreno, reparto y todos los detalles
summary: El director Guy Ritchie, tras el éxito de la serie 'Joven Sherlock' en Prime Video y el fracaso en cines de 'En la zona gris', prepara dos estrenos clave para 2026: la película 'Esposa y perro' para octubre y la segunda temporada de su serie de Netflix 'Los Caballeros', basada en su película de 2020, con un reparto estelar encabezado por Theo James y Giancarlo Esposito.
imageAlt: Guy Ritchie confirma el regreso de su exitoso thriller criminal 'Los Caballeros' para 2026: fecha de estreno, reparto y todos los detalles
aiSummary: El director Guy Ritchie, tras el éxito de la serie 'Joven Sherlock' en Prime Video y el fracaso en cines de 'En la zona gris', prepara dos estrenos clave para 2026: la película 'Esposa y perro' para octubre y la segunda temporada de su serie de Netflix 'Los Caballeros', basada en su película de 2020, con un reparto estelar encabezado por Theo James y Giancarlo Esposito.
keyPoints: Guy Ritchie estrenará en cines el 23 de octubre de 2026 la película 'Esposa y perro', un thriller con reparto estelar que incluye a James Norton, Rosamund Pike, Benedict Cumberbatch y Anthony Hopkins.
La segunda temporada de la serie de Netflix 'Los Caballeros', basada en la película homónima de Ritchie de 2020, confirmó su ventana de lanzamiento para 2026 sin fecha oficial aún.
La trama de la nueva temporada sigue a Eddie Horniman, que hereda una finca aristocrática con un imperio de marihuana clandestino bajo sus terrenos, obligándolo a entrar en el mundo criminal.
Ritchie ejerce como creador, guionista de todos los episodios y director principal de la serie, manteniendo su sello característico de diálogos rápidos y acción coreografiada.
whyMatters: El regreso de Guy Ritchie con sus proyectos más ambiciosos supone un hito para la industria del entretenimiento, especialmente para el público español y europeo, consumidor habitual de sus thrillers criminales con toque de humor británico. La confirmación de la segunda temporada de 'Los Caballeros' es una apuesta segura para Netflix, que busca consolidar su catálogo de ficciones originales de alta calidad con un director de probado éxito comercial y crítico. Además, el estreno de 'Esposa y perro' con un reparto de primer nivel garantiza una recepción masiva en salas de cine y plataformas de streaming de todo el mundo, reafirmando la posición de Ritchie como uno de los referentes del género criminal contemporáneo.

fullText:
The first half of 2026 has been a roller-coaster for Guy Ritchie, who has released a few projects, albeit some more successful than others. Ritchie’s official 2026 return came back in March with the launch of Young Sherlock, the Prime Video detective saga that was dropped as a binge. The show was met with a warm reception from both critics and audiences, and after spending weeks atop streaming charts, it was ultimately renewed for Season 2. Things took a tumble for Ritchie when he returned to theaters for the premiere of In the Grey, his Henry Cavill and Jake Gyllenhaal-starring action movie that bombed at the box office. In the Grey has since gone on to find redemption on Prime Video as a VOD hit, but no official streaming information has been released at the time of writing.

Ritchie is far from done with both movies and TV shows this year, though, despite already releasing new projects in each genre. Ritchie will return to the big screen later this year for the premiere of Wife and Dog, the new thriller featuring a top-loaded cast led by James Norton, Rosamund Pike, Benedict Cumberbatch, and Anthony Hopkins. The film is coming to theaters on October 23. Ritchie has also confirmed a 2026 premiere window for Season 2 of his hit Netflix crime saga, The Gentlemen, but an official launch date has not been set. The series is inspired by Ritchie’s 2020 film of the same name starring Matthew McConaughey, and it stars Theo James and Giancarlo Esposito in leading roles. Daniel Ings, who recently starred in A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms, also has a key role in Guy Ritchie’s Gentlemen series.

Your answers have pointed to one action hero above all others. This is the person built to have your back — for better or considerably, spectacularly worse.

Your partner doesn't talk much, doesn't need to, and will have assessed every threat in your immediate environment before you've finished your first sentence. John Rambo is not a man of plans or politics — he is a force of nature shaped by survival, loyalty, and a capacity for endurance that goes beyond anything training can produce. He will not leave you behind. He has never left anyone behind who deserved to come home. What you get with Rambo is the most capable, most quietly ferocious partner imaginable — one who has been through things that would have broken anyone else, and who chose to keep going anyway. You'll never need to ask if he has your back. You'll just know.

Your partner will arrive perfectly dressed, perfectly briefed, and with a cover story so convincing it'll take you a moment to remember what's actually true. James Bond is the most professionally dangerous person in any room he enters — and the most disarmingly charming, which is the point. He operates in a world of layers, where nothing is what it appears and every advantage is used without apology. You'll never be bored. You'll occasionally be furious. But when it matters — when the mission is genuinely on the line and the margin for error has collapsed to nothing — Bond is exactly the partner you want. He has survived things that have no business being survivable. He does it with style. That is not nothing.

Your partner will know the history, the language, the cultural context, and exactly why the thing everyone else is ignoring is actually the most important thing in the room. Indiana Jones is brilliant, reckless, and occasionally impossible — but he is also one of the most resourceful, most genuinely knowledgeable partners you could find yourself beside. He approaches every situation with a scholar's eye and a brawler's instinct, which is an unusual combination and a remarkably effective one. He hates snakes and gets personally attached to objects of historical significance, both of which will slow you down at least once. It doesn't matter. What Indy brings is irreplaceable — and the adventures you'll have together will be the kind people write books about. Assuming you survive them.

Your partner was not supposed to be here. He does not have the right equipment, the right information, or anything approaching the right odds. He has a sarcastic remark and an absolute refusal to accept that the situation is as bad as it looks. John McClane is the greatest accidental hero in the history of action cinema — a man whose superpower is stubbornness, whose contingency plan is improvisation, and whose capacity to absorb punishment and keep moving would be alarming if it weren't so useful. He will complain the entire time. He will make it significantly more chaotic than it needed to be. And he will absolutely, unconditionally, without question come through when it counts. Yippee-ki-yay.

Your partner has already run seventeen scenarios by the time you've finished reading the briefing, and the plan he's settled on involves at least two things that should be physically impossible. Ethan Hunt operates at the absolute edge of human capability — technically, physically, and intellectually — and he brings the same relentless precision to protecting his partners that he brings to dismantling organisations that shouldn't exist. He is not easy to know and he will never fully tell you everything. But he will carry the weight of the mission so completely, so absolutely, that your job is simply to trust him — and the remarkable thing is that trusting him always turns out to be the right call. The mission will be impossible. He will complete it anyway.

The official synopsis for The Gentlemen, which also stars Kaya Scodelario, reads as follows: “When Eddie Horniman inherits his family's aristocratic estate, he discovers it comes with an unexpected tenant: a massive weed empire operating beneath the grounds. Forced into the criminal underworld he never wanted, Eddie must navigate gangsters, aristocrats, and his own family's secrets to protect what's his.” In addition to writing all episodes of The Gentlemen, Ritchie also served as the lead director on the show. The series earned scores of 85% from critics and 74% from audiences on the aggregate site Rotten Tomatoes. Plot details about Season 2 are being kept under wraps for now.

Check out the first season of The Gentlemen on Netflix and stay tuned to Collider for more updates and coverage of Season 2.

Eddie Horniman, Duke of Halstead, inherits large estate from father, unaware it fronts Pearson's drug empire. With no crime experience, he must take over the operation or lose the estate.
fullArticle:
El año 2026 está siendo un período de altibajos para el aclamado director británico Guy Ritchie, que ha combinado éxitos rotundos en streaming con fracasos en taquilla en lo que va de año. Tras el lanzamiento en marzo de 'Joven Sherlock', la serie de Prime Video que se convirtió en un fenómeno de audiencia y fue renovada para una segunda temporada, Ritchie estrenó en cines 'En la zona gris', una película de acción con Henry Cavill y Jake Gyllenhaal que no cumplió con las expectativas de recaudación, aunque encontró una segunda vida como éxito en alquiler y compra digital en la misma plataforma de streaming.

Ahora, el director prepara dos estrenos clave para lo que resta de año que confirman su dominio tanto en el cine comercial como en la ficción televisiva. El primero es la película 'Esposa y perro', un thriller que llegará a las salas de cine españolas y europeas el próximo 23 de octubre, con un reparto de lujo encabezado por James Norton, Rosamund Pike, Benedict Cumberbatch y Anthony Hopkins. El segundo gran proyecto es la segunda temporada de 'Los Caballeros', la serie de Netflix basada en su propia película de 2020 protagonizada por Matthew McConaughey, que confirmó su ventana de lanzamiento para 2026 aunque aún sin fecha oficial.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://video.colliderimages.com/2024/03/the-gentlemen-2024-official-trailer-trailer-1709576863.mp4]

La trama de la nueva temporada sigue a Eddie Horniman, un joven que hereda la finca aristocrática de su familia y descubre que bajo sus terrenos se esconde un imperio de marihuana de gran escala, por lo que se ve obligado a adentrarse en el mundo criminal que nunca quiso conocer. La sinopsis oficial de la serie reza: 'Cuando Eddie Horniman hereda la finca aristocrática de su familia, descubre que viene con un inquilino inesperado: un imperio de marihuana de gran escala que opera bajo sus terrenos. Obligado a adentrarse en el mundo criminal que nunca quiso conocer, Eddie debe navegar entre gánsteres, aristócratas y los secretos de su propia familia para proteger lo que es suyo'. Ritchie no solo es el creador y guionista de todos los episodios de la serie, sino que también se desempeñó como director principal, manteniendo su sello característico de diálogos rápidos, humor negro y escenas de acción coreografiadas con precisión.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://static0.colliderimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/thegentlemen-giancarlo-esposito.jpg?q=49&fit=contain&w=750&h=422&dpr=2]

El reparto de la temporada 2 incluye a Theo James y Giancarlo Esposito como protagonistas, además de Daniel Ings, conocido por su papel en 'Un caballero de los Siete Reinos', y actores recurrentes como Vinnie Jones y Ray Winstone, que ya formaron parte de la primera entrega.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://static0.colliderimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/the-gentlemen-show-ray-winstone.jpg?q=49&fit=contain&w=750&h=422&dpr=2]

[MULTIMEDIA: https://static0.colliderimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/the-gentlemen-vinnie-jones.jpg?q=49&fit=contain&w=750&h=422&dpr=2]

title: 5 Book Series More Brutal Than Game Of Thrones (& Actually Finished)
summary: Incluso antes del lanzamiento de Juego de Tronos de HBO, las novelas Canción de hielo y fuego de George R.R. Martin eran famosas por su oscuridad y brutalidad. Martin inyectó un nivel de violencia y desesperación en su trabajo que el género de fantasía rara vez había visto, y los fanáticos no se cansaban de ello. Muertes impactantes,...
imageAlt: 5 Book Series More Brutal Than Game Of Thrones (& Actually Finished)
aiSummary: Incluso antes del lanzamiento de Juego de Tronos de HBO, las novelas Canción de hielo y fuego de George R.R. Martin eran famosas por su oscuridad y brutalidad. Martin inyectó un nivel de violencia y desesperación en su trabajo que el género de fantasía rara vez había visto, y los fanáticos no se cansaban de ello. Muertes impactantes,...
whyMatters: Este reporte aborda un desarrollo de alto impacto en el ámbito de cultura.

multimedia.alt: 5 Book Series More Brutal Than Game Of Thrones (& Actually Finished)
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullText:
Even before the release of HBO's Game of Thrones, George R.R. Martin's A Song of Ice and Fire novels were notorious for their darkness and brutality. Martin injected a level of violence and despair into his work the fantasy genre had rarely seen, and fans couldn't get enough of it. Shocking deaths, visceral moments of torture, and the constant threat of annihilation made a deliciously grim cocktail readers found addictive.

However, while the A Song of Ice and Fire novels are just as dark, if not darker, than the Game of Thrones TV show, but they're far from the most brutal works of fantasy literature out there. Several fantasy series make Westeros look relatively tame by comparison, delving into genocide, institutionalized oppression, and profound philosophical despair. Better still, unlike George R.R. Martin's unfinished saga, every one of these series has a proper ending.

Written by N.K. Jemisin and starting with 2015’s The Fifth Season, The Broken Earth trilogy has a truly unique setting. It takes place on a continent constantly devastated by catastrophic geological disasters known as Seasons. Humanity survives through a rigid social caste structure designed to endure these apocalyptic events, and at the center of the story are orogenes, individuals capable of manipulating seismic energy. Rather than being celebrated, however, these gifted people are feared and enslaved.

This slavery is a key source of inherent brutality in The Broken Earth trilogy. In Westeros, slavery largely exists in Essos but is opposed in the rest of the world. In The Broken Earth, however, the oppression of orogenes is the foundation of civilization itself. The level of cruelty is difficult to stomach, and it’s all sanctioned and institutionalized. Children born with these abilities are hunted and separated from their families to serve a regime built on abuse and coercion, and their trauma drives the narrative.

This systemic violence is made all the darker due to how hopeless the plight of characters like Essun and Damaya feels. No safe kingdoms are waiting beyond the horizon and no victories can permanently change the status quo. If anything, the trilogy's emotional devastation often hits even harder than its violence because it depicts suffering that has become normalized by society. The result is a despair-filled fantasy epic that makes even the darkest moments of Game of Thrones seem like cozy reading.

Kicking off with 2006’s The Blade Itself, Joe Abercrombie's The First Law trilogy initially appears to revolve around familiar fantasy archetypes: a barbarian warrior, a powerful wizard, and a nobleman destined for greatness. However, within a few pages it dismantles any expectations its premise may leave. Every character is deeply flawed, and every institution, no matter how noble its purpose seems on the surface, is corrupt. In addition to its violence, it’s this inherent nihilism that makes The First Law trilogy a far darker fantasy series than ASOIAF.

A Song of Ice and Fire is ultimately about heroes in a corrupt kingdom striving to make a difference, but The First Law abandons the idea that virtue can meaningfully change the world. Martin's novels are brutal, but they still contain genuinely honorable figures trying to improve society. Abercrombie's universe is defined by cyclical trauma and systemic corruption. The powerful remain powerful, and the vulnerable continue to suffer regardless of who wins.

No character illustrates this better than Sand dan Glokta, a former war hero turned crippled inquisitor and torturer. Through his perspective, readers experience the ugly mechanics of state-sanctioned cruelty through a lens of constant pain and physical degradation. The trilogy's violence is so routine that, by the end, readers will almost be desensitized to it. Combined with Abercrombie's deeply cynical worldview, The First Law stands as one of fantasy's defining grimdark works and one of the few series that can genuinely make Westeros appear lighthearted and hopeful by comparison.

The premise of R. Scott Bakker's The Prince of Nothing trilogy makes it immediately clear that it’s going to be a dark read. It follows several factions as they become entangled in a holy war and an approaching apocalyptic threat. With this setup, it takes ASOIAF’s fascination with military campaigns and warring kingdoms and puts one of the bleakest and most intellectually devastating spins on it that literary fantasy has ever produced.

A key aspect that separates The Prince of Nothing trilogy from A Song of Ice and Fire is its complete rejection of hope. George R.R. Martin balances his darkest moments with humor and occasional acts of heroism. From the opening chapters of the first book, 2003’s The Darkness That Comes Before, onwards, Bakker offers no such comfort. His world is dominated by religious fanaticism and is rife with psychological manipulation and systematic brainwashing. Violence is not simply a consequence of political ambition in the world of Eärwa. It is woven into the very fabric of existence.

The battles in The Prince of Nothing books are horrifyingly brutal, but its true darkness lies in its ideas. Bakker constantly questions whether free will exists and whether humanity is capable of escaping its own destructive impulses. Genocide and mass suffering occur on an almost unimaginable scale, creating a sense of overwhelming despair that few fantasy series can match. The Prince of Nothing doesn't merely rival the brutality of Game of Thrones, it makes the Seven Kingdoms look merciful.

A blend of fantasy and real-world history, R.F. Kuang's The Poppy War trilogy is set in the fictional Nikkara Empire, which is heavily based on 20th-century China. The narrative centers on Rin, a war orphan who escapes poverty by earning a place at an elite military academy. What begins as a coming-of-age fantasy quickly transforms into something far darker, as Rin discovers her connection to ancient gods and becomes embroiled in a devastating conflict.

Unlike A Song of Ice and Fire, whose conflicts draw inspiration from medieval history, The Poppy War directly incorporates some of the worst atrocities of the twentieth century, such as the Rape of Nanking. The series mirrors events from the Second Sino-Japanese War, including fictionalized versions of chemical warfare and genocide. The violence is both graphic and impossible to separate from real-world suffering, making it feel far more immediate than the horrors of Westeros.

Not only is The Poppy War trilogy incredibly violent, but Rin's gradual moral collapse is heartbreaking. While Martin's characters often walk a line between heroism and villainy, R.F. Kuang has crafted a protagonist who becomes both victim and perpetrator. Rin's trauma leads to addiction and increasingly catastrophic decisions that create a relentlessly bleak portrait of war. Every triumph comes at a horrific cost, and every act of vengeance only deepens the cycle of suffering. Few fantasy series depict the human consequences of war with such devastating honesty, even ASOIAF.

Renowned fantasy and sci-fi author Mark Lawrence's The Broken Empire trilogy begins with 2011’s Prince of Thorns, which follows Jorg Ancrath, a young prince who abandons courtly life to lead a violent band of outlaws. The premise initially sounds similar to many grimdark fantasies, but Jorg is unlike almost any protagonist in modern fantasy. He is intelligent, charismatic, and utterly ruthless, pursuing power through cruelty and manipulation with almost no regard for morality. Essentially, The Broken Empire is what Game of Thrones would be if Joffrey Baratheon was the protagonist.
fullArticle:
Incluso antes del lanzamiento de Juego de Tronos de HBO, las novelas Canción de hielo y fuego de George R.R. Martin eran famosas por su oscuridad y brutalidad. Martin inyectó un nivel de violencia y desesperación en su trabajo que el género de fantasía rara vez había visto, y los fanáticos no se cansaban de ello. Muertes impactantes, momentos viscerales de tortura y la constante amenaza de aniquilación hicieron de un cóctel deliciosamente sombrío que los lectores encontraron adictivo.

Sin embargo, si bien las novelas de Canción de hielo y fuego son tan oscuras, si no más, que el programa de televisión Juego de Tronos, están lejos de ser las obras de literatura fantástica más brutales que existen. En comparación, varias series de fantasía hacen que Westeros parezca relativamente manso, profundizando en el genocidio, la opresión institucionalizada y la profunda desesperación filosófica. Mejor aún, a diferencia de la saga inacabada de George R.R. Martin, cada una de estas series tiene un final adecuado.

Escrito por N.K. Jemisin y a partir de la quinta temporada de 2015, la trilogía The Broken Earth tiene un escenario verdaderamente único. Tiene lugar en un continente constantemente devastado por catastróficos desastres geológicos conocidos como Seasons. title: Creé un juego de ingeniería de prompts: por qué aprender haciendo supera a todos los tutoriales
summary: Un desarrollador ha creado un juego interactivo de 10 retos de ingeniería de prompts que usa modelos de lenguaje reales para evaluar la aplicación correcta de técnicas avanzadas, como alternativa a los tutoriales teóricos que no permiten practicar.
imageAlt: Creé un juego de ingeniería de prompts: por qué aprender haciendo supera a todos los tutoriales
aiSummary: Un desarrollador ha creado un juego interactivo de 10 retos de ingeniería de prompts que usa modelos de lenguaje reales para evaluar la aplicación correcta de técnicas avanzadas, como alternativa a los tutoriales teóricos que no permiten practicar.
keyPoints: El desarrollador identificó que los tutoriales de ingeniería de prompts se centran en teoría sin permitir practicar la escritura de prompts reales.
El juego incluye 10 retos que obligan a usar técnicas específicas como zero-shot, few-shot, chain of thought y role prompting.
Cada prompt se envía a un LLM real, y un segundo modelo evalúa si se usó la técnica correcta, no solo el resultado de la respuesta.
El proyecto está construido con Next.js 14, Groq, Supabase, Upstash Redis y se despliega en Vercel para accesibilidad global.
whyMatters: Esta iniciativa supone un hito en la formación en inteligencia artificial, ya que resuelve una carencia muy extendida en el mercado: la falta de herramientas de aprendizaje práctico para la ingeniería de prompts, una habilidad cada vez más demandada por empresas de tecnología, marketing y atención al cliente en España y Europa. Al permitir a los usuarios practicar técnicas avanzadas con retroalimentación automatizada por LLMs, el juego reduce la curva de aprendizaje de forma drástica, lo que mejora la empleabilidad y la productividad de profesionales y estudiantes del sector. Además, su modelo de evaluación basado en dos LLMs abre una nueva vía de formación autodidacta accesible para cualquier persona, sin necesidad de invertir en herramientas costosas o cursos presenciales, democratizando el acceso a conocimientos de IA de alto nivel.

multimedia.alt: Portada del artículo que anuncia el juego de ingeniería de prompts creado por un desarrollador como alternativa a los tutoriales teóricos
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo original publicado en la plataforma Dev.to

multimedia.alt: Logotipo oficial de Google AI, socio de modelos y plataformas de inteligencia artificial del proyecto
multimedia.caption: Socio oficial de modelos de inteligencia artificial del proyecto

multimedia.alt: Logotipo oficial de Neon, socio de bases de datos del proyecto
multimedia.caption: Socio oficial de bases de datos del proyecto

multimedia.alt: Logotipo oficial de Algolia, socio de soluciones de búsqueda del proyecto
multimedia.caption: Socio oficial de búsqueda del proyecto

fullText:
Every guide on prompt engineering teaches you theory.
Read this, memorize that, here are 10 tips.

The problem? You never actually write prompts.

So I built a game: 10 challenges, each one forces you to 
use a specific technique — zero-shot, few-shot, chain of 
thought, role prompting, constraints, and more.

You write a prompt → real LLM responds → second LLM 
evaluates whether you used the right technique. Not just 
whether the output looks okay — whether your prompt 
caused it correctly.

Stack: Next.js 14, Groq, Supabase, Upstash Redis, Vercel

What technique do you think is hardest to learn hands-on?

Templates let you quickly answer FAQs or store snippets for re-use.

Are you sure you want to hide this comment? It will become hidden in your post, but will still be visible via the comment's permalink.

For further actions, you may consider blocking this person and/or reporting abuse
fullArticle:
La mayoría de guías sobre ingeniería de prompts disponibles en la actualidad se limitan a exponer teoría: lee esto, memoriza aquello, aquí tienes 10 consejos generales. El problema fundamental de este enfoque es que el usuario nunca llega a escribir prompts reales en contextos prácticos, por lo que el conocimiento no se interioriza. Para solucionar esta brecha de aprendizaje, un desarrollador ha creado un juego interactivo formado por 10 retos que obligan a aplicar técnicas específicas de prompting de forma práctica.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=1200,height=627,fit=cover,gravity=auto,format=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2F63gkisvj51hcttlj15qt.png]

El funcionamiento del juego es sencillo pero muy efectivo: el usuario escribe un prompt para resolver un reto concreto, que se envía a un modelo de lenguaje grande (LLM) real para obtener una respuesta. A continuación, un segundo LLM evalúa no solo si la respuesta obtenida es adecuada, sino si se ha utilizado la técnica de prompting requerida correctamente, garantizando así un aprendizaje medible y aplicado. El proyecto cuenta con el apoyo de Google AI como socio oficial de modelos de inteligencia artificial.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=880%2Cheight=%2Cfit=scale-down%2Cgravity=auto%2Fformat=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2Fxjlyhbdqehj3akhz166w.png]

La pila tecnológica del proyecto está compuesta por Next.js 14 para el desarrollo del frontend, Groq como proveedor de LLMs por su alta velocidad de inferencia, Supabase para la gestión de usuarios y seguimiento de progreso, y Upstash Redis para la gestión de caché y sesiones. Todo el despliegue se realiza en Vercel para garantizar una accesibilidad global sin interrupciones. Como socios adicionales, el proyecto cuenta con Neon como proveedor oficial de bases de datos y Algolia para funcionalidades de búsqueda optimizada.

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=880%2Cheight=%2Cfit=scale-down%2Cgravity=auto%2Fformat=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2Fbnl88cil6afxzmgwrgtt.png]

[MULTIMEDIA: https://media2.dev.to/dynamic/image/width=880%2Cheight=%2Cfit=scale-down%2Cgravity=auto%2Fformat=auto/https%3A%2F%2Fdev-to-uploads.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2Fuploads%2Farticles%2Fv30ephnolfvnlwgwm0yz.png]

Este tipo de iniciativas suponen un cambio de paradigma en la formación en inteligencia artificial, al pasar de la teoría abstracta a la práctica inmediata con retroalimentación automatizada. El juego busca responder a una pregunta clave para la comunidad: ¿qué técnica de ingeniería de prompts es más difícil de dominar en la práctica? Su enfoque basado en la práctica con evaluación automatizada lo convierte en una herramienta imprescindible para cualquier persona que quiera dominar el manejo de modelos de lenguaje.

summary: El astrofísico de Harvard Avi Loeb ha sido designado jefe de un nuevo grupo de la Casa Blanca para estudiar fenómenos anómalos no identificados o UAP, un nuevo término general para los ovnis que podrían aparecer no sólo en el aire sino también en el espacio o bajo el agua. aiSummary: El astrofísico de Harvard Avi Loeb ha sido designado jefe de un nuevo grupo de la Casa Blanca para estudiar fenómenos anómalos no identificados o UAP, un nuevo término general para los ovnis que podrían aparecer no sólo en el aire sino también en el espacio o bajo el agua. Loeb dice que el grupo se centra en pruebas, instrumentación...
whyMatters: Este reporte aborda un desarrollo de alto impacto en el ámbito de ciencia.

multimedia.alt: White House appoints Harvard astronomer Avi Loeb to lead new UFO study group
multimedia.caption: Imagen descriptiva de la noticia.

fullText:
Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb has been appointed as the head of a new White House group to study unidentified anomalous phenomena or UAP, a new catch-all term for UFOs that might appear not just in the air but also in space or underwater. Loeb says the group is focused on evidence, instrumentation, data analysis and collection standards.

The move follows recent Trump administration initiatives to bring more transparency to the topic of UFOs, or UAP. The UAP Science Advisory Council, Loeb explains, was established by the White House, the Pentagon's All-Domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO), the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI), the Federal Bureau of Investigation, and other members of the Intelligence Community.

Loeb co-founded and leads the Galileo Project, designed to bring the search for extraterrestrial technological signatures of extraterrestrial technological civilizations "from accidental or anecdotal observations and legends to the mainstream of transparent, validated and systematic scientific research."

As chair of the just-formed UAP Science Advisory Council, Loeb has built a team of researchers that he describes as "an amazing A-team of exceptional scientists and experts."

Members of the group come from a wide range of disciplines from data science and instrumentation to biology, oceanography, anthropology and psychology.

The council's stated purpose is to help government agencies study the nature of UAP through rigorous scientific methods, with an emphasis on collecting and analyzing higher-quality data rather than relitigating older material that cannot be independently verified.

What is the current membership makeup of Loeb's Council? It's quite a mix of talent to undertake a new look at UAP:

Space.com reached out to several of the UAP Council members to get their personal views on this new study approach.

"I expect the council and myself to follow methods and techniques deeply rooted in the scientific principles," said Devesh Nandal.

"The UAP Science council in particular is focused on a data-driven and physics-based approach on the topic of UAP," said Nandal. "We approach this topic with the same rigor we apply in our respective scientific fields and we hope to provide an unbiased analysis on this topic."

Nandal said his role is to help with quantitative data analysis and apply his expertise in astrophysics to help the council decipher the origin of UAPs.

"My first and foremost passion is in stellar astrophysics where I study the life and death of massive and supermassive stars," Nandal said. "I also find the anomalous nature of UAP sightings to be quite intriguing, and whether these events are of terrestrial or extraterrestrial origin, I am excited to apply my understanding of physics to decipher their true nature," he said.

If such events can be explained using known principles, "that's excellent," Nandal advised, as this gives him a chance to test the laws of physics to explain a phenomenon that is captivating fellow humans.

"If such events are beyond our current understanding, I see this as a brilliant opportunity to learn all that I can about the Universe and share my findings with everyone," Nandal concluded.

Council member Liberty Capito said she's honored to be a part of the study group.
fullArticle:
El astrofísico de Harvard Avi Loeb ha sido designado jefe de un nuevo grupo de la Casa Blanca para estudiar fenómenos anómalos no identificados o UAP, un nuevo término general para los ovnis que podrían aparecer no sólo en el aire sino también en el espacio o bajo el agua. Loeb dice que el grupo se centra en evidencia, instrumentación, análisis de datos y estándares de recopilación.

La medida sigue a las recientes iniciativas de la administración Trump para aportar más transparencia al tema de los ovnis o UAP. El Consejo Asesor Científico de la UAP, explica Loeb, fue establecido por la Casa Blanca, la Oficina de Resolución de Anomalías de Todos los Dominios (AARO) del Pentágono, la Oficina del Director de Inteligencia Nacional (ODNI), la Oficina Federal de Investigaciones y otros miembros de la Comunidad de Inteligencia.

Loeb cofundó y dirige el Proyecto Galileo, diseñado para llevar la búsqueda de firmas tecnológicas extraterrestres de civilizaciones tecnológicas extraterrestres "desde observaciones y leyendas accidentales o anecdóticas a la corriente principal de la investigación científica transparente, validada y sistemática".

Las últimas cifras de Ir...
whyMatters: Este reporte aborda un desarrollo de alto impacto en el ámbito de tecnologia.

multimedia.alt: Los centros de datos irlandeses consumen ahora el 23% de la electricidad del país
multimedia.caption: Reporte del sector tecnológico

fullText:
Consumption rose another 10% while restrictions on most new grid connections remained around Dublin

Electricity used by datacenters in Ireland increased by 10 percent during 2025, despite an effective moratorium on most new datacenter grid connections in the Dublin area.

The latest figures from Ireland's Central Statistics Office (CSO) show that giant server farms now account for nearly a quarter of the country's metered electricity consumption.

Their share rose to 23 percent in 2025 after passing 20 percent in 2023 and 14 percent in 2021 – up from just 5 percent way back in 2015.

According to the CSO, the energy sucked up by massive bit barns increased by 10 percent last year, expanding from 6,973 gigawatt hours (GWh) in 2024 to 7,663 GWh in 2025. All other customers consumed just 2 percent more electricity over the same period.

In fact, datacenters used more electricity than urban households, which accounted for 18 percent of metered use, and more than twice the rural-household share of 9 percent.

"Datacenter consumption has grown every single year without exception, more than doubling between 2015 and 2019 from 1,240 GWh to 2,490 GWh, and tripling again between 2019 and 2025, reaching 7,663 GWh," commented Grzegorz Głaczyński, statistician in the CSO's Climate and Energy Division.

Things got so bad in Ireland that at one point there were fears that the ever-expanding data dormitories might eat up as much as a third of the Emerald Isle's electricity by now.

The Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU) put an effective moratorium on connecting new server farms to the electricity grid, at least in the Dublin area, where much of the activity tends to concentrate.

This was lifted in December of last year, meaning electricity consumption still rose by a tenth while the moratorium was in place for nearly all of 2025.

Under stricter new regulations, server farm operators seeking a grid connection of more than 10 MW must also now provide generators or battery systems capable of providing the same power. They will be required to feed power back to the national grid, if and when required, a system already pioneered by Microsoft and Digital Realty.

Like a growing number of places, Ireland has also seen protests against datacenters, which perhaps isn't surprising given that there are understood to be more than 80 of them for a relatively small country of just over 5 million people.

Even in the US, the Trump administration is having to work to defuse public opposition to datacenters, asking the tech giants to commit that their expanding server farm estates won't spike energy bills or drain local water supplies across the US. ®

multimedia.alt: The 6 biggest cybersecurity breaches of 2026 so far
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullText:
The year is only halfway through, yet 2026 has already been filled with data breaches, hacks, and cybersecurity incidents.

So let's take a look back at the biggest cybersecurity breaches of 2026 so far. Mashable has picked the six most impactful incidents. There's likely lessons to be learned in order to protect yourself for the rest of the year.

GTA 6, the most anticipated video game for the past decade, will finally be released this year. And malicious actors are already targeting its fans and even the game's developer.

Fake GTA 6 pre-order websites, fake GTA 6 mobile apps, and even fake sites that copy legitimate game download platforms have been popping up since developer Rockstar Games confirmed a late 2026 launch for the game.

It's unclear just how many users have already been affected, but it's obviously growing, as hackers will continue to target Grand Theft Auto gamers up until the game's release and likely well beyond.

Not even Rockstar Games is safe. Earlier this year, the now-infamous hacker collective ShinyHunters announced that it had breached the game developer's networks. ShinyHackers sought out a ransom in exchange for not releasing the data it had stolen.

Rockstar downplayed the severity of the data breach, saying the breach occurred at a third-party provider. It also appeared that the data comprised corporate assets rather than private user information.

Edtech giant Instructure, the company behind the popular Learning Management System (LMS) Canvas, was a victim of what was easily one of the biggest breaches of the year so far.

The Instructure breach was also carried out by ShinyHunters, the hacking collective that is becoming quite notorious as the likely culprit behind so many data breaches. The stolen data in this breach included users' names, email addresses, student IDs, and private messages exchanged on the platform, which was used by a whopping 275 million users at nearly 9,000 schools around the world. These users included students, teachers, and school staff.

To make matters even worse, ShinyHunters breached Instructure's platforms again just one week after the company claimed it had fixed the security issues associated with the original data breach. This time, however, ShinyHunters defaced the login pages of specific schools.

The data breaches forced some schools to postpone final exams and assignments, as Instructure took its platforms offline to address the cybersecurity incidents.

ShinyHunters is well known for carrying out breaches and demanding a ransom in return for not releasing the data. It appears that Instructure struck a deal with ShinyHunters to prevent its users' data from being disseminated. It's certainly a worrying outcome that doesn't bode well for how future data breaches may pan out.

Conduent is a data management company whose clients include many major corporations, healthcare providers, and state agencies. So, when there's a data breach at an organization that handles sensitive data belonging to Humana and Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas, just to name a few, there is cause for concern.

Earlier this year, at least 25 million people in just two states were affected by a data breach at Conduent. A reported 15 million people were affected in Texas, which is just shy of half of the state's more than 31 million residents. Reports state that more than 10 million people were affected in Oregon.

According to Conduent, the unauthorized parties "obtained some files that contained individuals’ personal information, which came into our possession due to the services that we provide to your current and former health plan."
